english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ لا يَرْغَبُ فِي الْجَزَاءِ،
english translation text: O God, O He who desires no repayment!
O He who shows no remorse at bestowal!

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُكَافِئُ عَبْدَهُ عَلَى السَّوآءِ،
english translation text: O He who rewards not His servant tit for tat!
Your kindness is a new beginning, Your pardon gratuitous bounty,
Your punishment justice, Your decree a choice for the best!

arabic text: إنْ أَعْطَيْتَ لَمْ تَشُبْ عَطَآءَكَ بِمَنٍّ،
english translation text: If You bestowest, You stainest not Your bestowal with obligation,

arabic text: وَإنْ مَنَعْتَ لَمْ يَكُنْ مَنْعُكَ تَعَدِّيا
english translation text: and if You withholdest, You withholdest not in transgression.

arabic text: تَشْكُرُ مَنْ شَكَرَكَ وَأَنْتَ أَلْهَمْتَهُ شُكْرَكَ،
english translation text: You showest gratitude to him who thanks You, while You hast inspired him to thank You.

arabic text: وَتُكَافِئُ مَنْ حَمِدَكَ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّمْتَهُ حَمْدَكَ،
english translation text: You rewardest him who praises You, while though You hast taught him Your praise.

arabic text: تَسْتُرُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ فَضَحْتَهُ
english translation text: You coverest him whom, if You willed, You wouldst expose,

arabic text: وَتَجُودُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ مَنَعْتَهُ،
english translation text: and You art generous toward him from whom, if You willed, You wouldst withhold.
Both are worthy of Your exposure and withholding,

arabic text: غَيْرَ أَنَّكَ بَنَيْتَ أَفْعَالَكَ عَلَى التَّفَضُّلِ،
english translation text: but You hast founded Your acts upon gratuitous bounty,
channelled Your power into forbearance,
received him who disobeyed You with clemency,
and disregarded him who intended wrongdoing against himself.

arabic text: تَسْتَنْظِرُهُمْ بِأناتِكَ إلى الإنَابَةِ وَتَتْرُكُ مُعَاجَلَتَهُمْ إلَى التَّوْبَةِ
english translation text: You awaitest their turning back without haste and refrainest from rushing them toward repentance,
so that the perisher among them may not perish because of You
and the wretched may not be wretched through Your favour,
but only after Your prolonged excusing him
and successive arguments against him,
as an act of generosity through Your pardon, O Generous,
and an act of kindliness through Your tenderness, O Clement!
It is You who hast opened for Your servants a door
to Your pardon, which You hast named 'repentance'.

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَ عَلَى ذلِكَ البَابِ دَلِيلاً مِنْ وَحْيِكَ
english translation text: You hast placed upon that door a pointer from Your revelation,

arabic text: لِئَلاَّ يَضِلُّوا عَنْهُ فَقُلْتَ تَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ :
english translation text: lest they stray from it: You hast said (blessed is Your Name),

arabic text: (تُوبُوا إلَى الله تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً عَسَى رَبُّكُمْ
english translation text: "Repent toward God with unswerving repentance! It may be that Your Lord
will acquit of your evil deeds and will admit you into
gardens beneath which rivers flow,
upon the day when God will not degrade the Prophet

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَهُ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَانِهِمْ
english translation text: and those who have faith along with him, their light running before them and on their right hands,

arabic text: يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا
english translation text: and they say: 'Our Lord, complete for us our light, and forgive us!
Surely You art powerful over everything" (66:8).

arabic text: فَمَا عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ ذلِكَ الْمَنْزِلِ
english translation text: What is the excuse of him who remains heedless of entering that house
after the opening of the door and the setting up of the pointer?

arabic text: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي زِدْتَ فِي السَّوْمِ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ لِعِبَادِكَ
english translation text: It is You who hast raised the price against Yourself to the advantage of Your servants,
desiring their profit in their trade with You,
their triumph through reaching You, and their increase on account of You,
for You hast said (blessed is Your Name and high art You exalted),
"Whoso brings a good deed shall have ten the like of it,

arabic text: وَمَنْ جَاءَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ فَلاَ يُجْزى إلاّ مِثْلَهَا)
english translation text: and whoso brings an evil deed shall only be recompensed the like of it" (6:160).

arabic text: وَقُلْتَ: (مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ يُنْفِقُونَ أَمْوَالَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ الله كَمَثَلِ حَبَّة
english translation text: You hast said, "The likeness of those who expend their wealth in the way of God is as the likeness of a grain of corn

arabic text: أَنْبَتَتْ سَبْعَ سَنَابِلَ فِي كُلِّ سُنْبُلَة مَائَةُ حَبَّة
english translation text: that sprouts seven ears, in every ear a hundred grains;
so God multiplies unto whom He wills" (2:261).

arabic text: وَقُلْتَ: (مَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ يُقْرِضُ الله قَرْضاً حَسَنَاً
english translation text: You hast said, "Who is he that will lend to God a good loan,
and He will multiply it for him manifold" (2:245)?

arabic text: وَمَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنْ نَظَائِرِهِنَّ فِي الْقُرْآنِ مِنْ تَضَاعِيفِ الْحَسَنَاتِ،
english translation text: And You hast sent down in the Qur'an similar verses on the multiplying of good deeds.

arabic text: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي دَلَلْتَهُمْ بِقَوْلِكَ مِنْ غَيْبِكَ وَتَرْغِيْبِكَ
english translation text: It is You who hast pointed them through Your speech from Your Unseen and Your encouragement

arabic text: الَّذِي فِيهِ حَظُّهُمْ عَلَى مَا لَوْ سَتَرْتَهُ عَنْهُمْ
english translation text: in which lies their good fortune toward that which - hadst You covered it from them

arabic text: لَمْ تُدْرِكْهُ أَبْصَارُهُمْ وَلَمْ تَعِـهِ أَسْمَاعُهُمْ
english translation text: their eyes would not have perceived, their ears would not have heard,
and their imaginations would not have grasped,

arabic text: فَقُلْتَ: (اذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِيْ وَلا تَكْفُرُونِ)
english translation text: for You hast said, "Remember Me and I will remember you be thankful to Me, and be you not thankless towards Me" (2:152)!
You hast said, "If you are thankful, surely I will increase you,
but if you are thankless, My chastisement is surely terrible" (14:7);
And You hast said, "Supplicate Me and I will respond to you,
surely those who wax too proud to worship Me
shall enter Gehenna utterly abject" (40:60).
Hence You hast named supplicating You 'worship' and refraining from it 'waxing proud',

arabic text: وَتَوَعَّدْتَ عَلَى تَرْكِهِ دُخُولَ جَهَنَّمَ دَاخِرِينَ،
english translation text: and You hast threatened that the refraining from it would yield entrance into Gehenna in utter abjection.
So they remember You for Your kindness, they thank You for Your bounty,
they supplicate You by Your command,
and they donate for You in order to seek Your increase;
in all this lies their deliverance from Your wrath
and their triumph through Your good pleasure.

arabic text: وَلَوْ دَلَّ مَخْلُوقٌ مَخْلُوقاً مِنْ نَفْسِهِ
english translation text: Were any creature himself to direct another creature

arabic text: عَلَى مِثْلِ الَّذِيْ دَلَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عِبَادَكَ مِنْكَ
english translation text: to the like of that to which You Yourself hast directed Your servants,
he would be described by beneficence,
qualified by kindness, and praised by every tongue.

arabic text: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ مَا وُجِدَ فِي حَمْدِكَ مَذْهَبٌ،
english translation text: So to You belongs praise as long as there is found a way to praise You

arabic text: وَمَا بَقِيَ لِلْحَمْدِ لَفْظٌ تُحْمَدُ بِهِ وَمَعْنىً يَنْصَرفُ إلَيْهِ
english translation text: and as long as there remains for praising words by which You may be praised and meanings which may be spent in praise!

arabic text: يَـا مَنْ تَحَمَّدَ إلَى عِبَـادِهِ بِالإِحْسَـانِ وَالْفَضْل،
english translation text: O He who shows Himself praiseworthy to His servants through beneficence and bounty,
flooding them with kindness and graciousness!

arabic text: مَا أَفْشَى فِيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ وَأَسْبَغَ عَلَيْنَا مِنَّتَكَ،
english translation text: How much Your favour has been spread about among us, Your kindness lavished upon us,
and Your goodness singled out for us!
You hast guided us to Your religion which You hast chosen,
Your creed with which You art pleased,
and Your path which You hast made smooth,

arabic text: وَبَصَّرْتَنَا الزُّلْفَةَ لَدَيْكَ وَالوُصُولَ إلَى كَـرَامَتِكَ.
english translation text: and You hast shown us proximity to You and arrival at Your generosity!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَأَنْتَ جَعَلْتَ مِنْ صَفَـايَـا تِلْكَ الْوَظَائِفِ
english translation text: O God, You hast appointed among the choicest of those duties
and the most special of those obligations

arabic text: شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُ مِنْ سَائِرِ الشُّهُورِ،
english translation text: the month of Ramadan, which You hast singled out from other months,
chosen from among all periods and eras,
and preferred over all times of the year

arabic text: بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ وَالنُّورِ،
english translation text: through the Qur'an and the Light which You sent down within it,
the faith which You multiplied by means of it,
the fasting which You obligated therein,
the standing in prayer which You encouraged at its time,
and the Night of Decree which You magnified therein,

arabic text: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر،
english translation text: the night which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3).

arabic text: ثُمَّ آثَرْتَنَا بِهِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الأُمَمِ
english translation text: Through it You hast preferred us over the other communities
and through its excellence You hast chosen us to the exclusion of the people of the creeds.
We fasted by Your command in its daylight,
we stood in prayer with Your help in its night,

arabic text: مُتَعَرِّضِينَ بِصِيَامِهِ وَقِيَامِهِ لِمَا عَرَّضْتَنَا لَهُ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ،
english translation text: presenting ourselves by its fasting and its standing to the mercy which You hast held up before us,
and we found through it the means to Your reward.

arabic text: وَأَنْتَ الْمَليءُ بِمَا رُغِبَ فِيهِ إلَيْكَ،
english translation text: And You art full of what is sought from You,
munificent with what is asked of Your bounty,
and near to him who strives for Your nearness.

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَقَامَ فِينَا هَذَا الشَّهْرُ مَقَامَ حَمْد
english translation text: This month stood among us in a standing place of praise,
accompanied us with the companionship of one approved,
and profited us with the most excellent profit of the world's creatures.

arabic text: ثُمَّ قَدْ فَارَقَنَا عِنْدَ تَمَامِ وَقْتِهِ وَانْقِطَاعِ مُدَّتِهِ وَوَفَاءِ عَدَدِهِ،
english translation text: Then it parted from us at the completion of its time, the end of its term, and the fulfilment of its number.

arabic text: فَنَحْنُ مُوَدِّعُوهُ وِدَاعَ مَنْ عَزَّ فِرَاقُهُ عَلَيْنَا
english translation text: So we bid farewell to it with the farewell of one whose parting pains us,
whose leaving fills us with gloom and loneliness,
and to whom we have come to owe a safeguarded claim,
an observed inviolability, and a discharged right.
We say: Peace be upon You,

arabic text: يَا شَهْرَ اللهِ الأكْبَرَ، وَيَا عِيْدَ أَوْلِيَائِهِ.
english translation text: O greatest month of God! O festival of His friends!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَـا أكْرَمَ مَصْحُـوب مِنَ الأوْقَاتِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O most noble of accompanying times!

arabic text: وَيَا خَيْرَ شَهْر فِي الأيَّامِ وَالسَّاعَاتِ.
english translation text: O best of months in days and hours!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر قَرُبَتْ فِيهِ الآمالُ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, month in which expectations come near
and good works are scattered about!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَرِين جَلَّ قَدْرُهُ مَوْجُوداً،
english translation text: Peace be upon You, comrade who is great in worth when found

arabic text: وَأَفْجَعَ فَقْدُهُ مَفْقُوداً، وَمَرْجُوٍّ آلَمَ فِرَاقُهُ.
english translation text: and who torments through absence when lost, anticipated friend whose parting gives pain!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَلِيف آنَسَ مُقْبِلاً فَسَرَّ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, familiar who brought comfort in coming, thus making happy,
who left loneliness in going, thus giving anguish!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مُجَاوِر رَقَّتْ فِيهِ الْقُلُوبُ، وَقَلَّتْ فِيهِ الذُّنُوبُ.
english translation text: Peace be upon You, neighbour in whom hearts became tender and sins became few!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ نَاصِر أَعَانَ عَلَى الشَّيْطَانِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, helper who aided against Satan,
companion who made easy the paths of good-doing!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا أكْثَرَ عُتَقَاءَ اللهِ فِيكَ
english translation text: Peace be upon You - How many became freedmen of God within You!

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْعَدَ مَنْ رَعَى حُرْمَتَكَ بكَ!.
english translation text: How happy those who observed the respect due to You!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَمْحَاكَ لِلذُّنُوبِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon You - How many the sins You erased!
How many the kinds of faults You covered over!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَطْوَلَكَ عَلَى الْمُجْرِمِينَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon You - How drawn out wert You for the sinners!
How awesome wert You in the hearts of the faithful!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر لا تُنَافِسُهُ الأيَّامُ.
english translation text: Peace be upon You, month with which no days compete!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر هُوَ مِنْ كُلِّ أَمْر سَلاَمٌ.
english translation text: Peace be upon You, month which is peace in all affairs!
Peace be upon You, You whose companionship is not disliked,
You whose friendly mixing is not blamed!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمَا وَفَدْتَ عَلَيْنَا بِالْبَرَكَاتِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon You, just as You hast entered upon us with blessings
and cleansed us of the defilement of offenses!
Peace be upon You - You art not bid farewell in annoyance
nor is Your fasting left in weariness!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مَطْلُوبِ قَبْلَ وَقْتِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, object of seeking before Your time,
object of sorrow before Your passing!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمْ مِنْ سُوء صُرِفَ بِكَ عَنَّا
english translation text: Peace be upon You - How much evil was turned away from us through You!

arabic text: وَكَمْ مِنْ خَيْر أُفِيضَ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا.
english translation text: How much good flowed upon us because of You!
Peace be upon You and upon the Night of Decree

arabic text: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر.
english translation text: which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3)!

arabic text: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ما كَانَ أَحْرَصَنَا بِالأمْسِ عَلَيْكَ
english translation text: Peace be upon You - How much we craved You yesterday!
How intensely we shall yearn for You tomorrow!

arabic text: أَلسَلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى فَضْلِكَ الَّذِي حُرِمْنَاهُ ،
english translation text: Peace be upon You and upon Your bounty which has now been made unlawful to us
and upon Your blessings gone by which have now been stripped away from us!

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّا أَهْلُ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الِّذِي شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
english translation text: O God, we are the people of this month. Through it You hast ennobled us

arabic text: وَوَفّقتَنَا بِمَنِّكَ لَهُ حِينَ جَهِلَ الاَشْقِيَا وَقْتَهُُ
english translation text: and given us success because of Your kindness, while the wretched are ignorant of its time.
Made unlawful to them is its bounty because of their wretchedness.

arabic text: أَنْتَ وَلِيُّ مَا اثَرْتَنَا بِهِ مِنْ مَعْرِفَتِهِ،
english translation text: You art the patron of the knowledge of it by which You hast preferred us,
and its prescribed practices to which You hast guided us.

arabic text: وَقَدْ تَوَلَّيْنَا بِتَوْفِيقِكَ صِيَامَهُ وَقِيَامَهُ عَلى تَقْصِير،
english translation text: We have undertaken, through Your giving success, its fasting and its standing in prayer, but with shortcomings,
and we have performed little of much.
O God, so to You belongs praise, in admission of evil doing

arabic text: وَاعْتِرَافاً بِالإضَاعَةِ، وَلَك مِنْ قُلُوبِنَا عَقْدُ النَّدَمِ،
english translation text: and confession of negligence, and to You belongs remorse firmly knitted in our hearts
and seeking of pardon sincerely uttered by our tongues.

arabic text: فَاْجُرْنَا عَلَى مَا أَصَابَنَا فِيهِ مِنَ التَّفْرِيطِ
english translation text: Reward us, in spite of the neglect that befell us in this month,

arabic text: أَجْرَاً نَسْتَدْركُ بِهِ الْفَضْلَ الْمَرْغُوبَ فِيهِ،
english translation text: with a reward through which we may reach the bounty desired from it

arabic text: وَنَعْتَاضُ بِهِ مِنْ أَنْوَاعِ الذُّخْرِ الْمَحْرُوصِ عَلَيْهِ ،
english translation text: and win the varieties of its craved stores!

arabic text: وَأَوْجِبْ لَنَا عُذْرَكَ عَلَى مَا قَصَّرْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ حَقِّكَ،
english translation text: Make incumbent upon us Your pardon for our falling short of Your right in this month

arabic text: وَابْلُغْ بِأَعْمَارِنَا مَا بَيْنَ أَيْديْنَا مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُقْبِلِ،
english translation text: and make our lives which lie before us reach the coming month of Ramadan!
Once You hast made us reach it, help us perform
the worship of which You art worthy,

arabic text: وَأَدِّنَا إلَى الْقِيَامِ بِمَا يَسْتَحِقُّهُ مِنَ الطَّاعَةِ
english translation text: cause us to undertake the obedience which You deservest,
and grant us righteous works

arabic text: مَا يَكون دَرَكاً لِحَقِّكَ فِي الشَّهْرَيْنِ مِنْ شُهُورِ الدَّهْرِ.
english translation text: that we may fulfil Your right in these two months of the months of time.

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَمَا أَلْمَمْنَا بِهِ فِي شَهْرِنَا هَذَا مِنْ لَمَم أَوْ إثْم،
english translation text: O God, as for the small and large sins which we have committed in this our month,

arabic text: أَوْ وَاقَعْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ ذَنْبِ وَاكْتَسَبْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ خَطِيئَة
english translation text: the misdeeds into which we have fallen, and the offenses which we have earned

arabic text: عَلَى تَعَمُّد مِنَّا أو عَلى نِسيانٍ ظَلَمنا فيه أنفُسَنا أَوِ انْتَهَكْنَا بِهِ حُرْمَةً مِنْ غَيْرِنَا
english translation text: purposefully or in forgetfulness, wronging ourselves thereby or violating the respect due to others,

arabic text: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَاسْتُرْنَا بِسِتْرِكَ،
english translation text: bless Muhammad and his Household, cover us over with Your covering,
pardon us through Your pardoning,
place us not before the eyes of the gloaters because of that,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَبْسُطْ عَلَيْنَا فِيهِ أَلْسُنَ الطَّاعِنينَ،
english translation text: stretch not toward us the tongues of the defamers,
and employ us in that which will alleviate and expiate

arabic text: لِمَا أَنْكَرْتَ مِنَّا فِيهِ بِرَأْفَتِكَ الَّتِي لاَ تَنْفَدُ،
english translation text: whatever You disapprovest from us within it through Your clemency which does not run out,
and Your bounty which does not diminish!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
redress our being afflicted by our month,
bless us in this day of our festival and our fast-breaking,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْهُ مِنْ خَيْرِ يَوْم مَرَّ عَلَيْنَا أَجْلَبِهِ لِعَفْو، وَأَمْحَاهُ لِذَنْبِ،
english translation text: make it one of the best of days that have passed over us, the greatest in attracting Your pardon, and the most effacing toward sins,

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لَنا ما خَفِيَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِنَا وَمَا عَلَنَ.
english translation text: and forgive us our sins, both the concealed and the public!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ اسلَخْنَا بِانْسِلاَخِ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ مِنْ خَطَايَانَا
english translation text: O God, with the passing of this month make us pass forth from our offenses,
with its departure make us depart from our evil deeds,
and appoint us thereby among its most felicitous people,

arabic text: وَأَجْزَلِهِمْ قِسَمَاً فِيـهِ وَأَوْفَـرِهِمْ حَظّاً مِنْـهُ.
english translation text: the most plentiful of them in portion, and the fullest of them in share!

arabic text: أللّهُمَّ وَمَنْ رَعَى حَقّ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهِ
english translation text: O God, when any person observes this month as it should be observed,

arabic text: وَحَفِظَ حُرْمَتَهُ حَقَّ حِفْظِهَا وَقَامَ بِحُدُودِهِ حَقَّ قِيَامِهَا،
english translation text: safeguards its inviolability as it should be safeguarded, attends to its bounds as they should be attended to,

arabic text: وَأتَّقَى ذُنُوبَهُ حَقَّ تُقَاتِهَا أَوْ تَقَرَّبَ إلَيْكَ بِقُرْبَة
english translation text: fears its misdeeds as they should be feared, or seeks nearness to You with any act of nearness-seeking

arabic text: أَوْجَبَتْ رِضَاكَ لَهُ وَعَطَفَتْ رَحْمَتَكَ عَلَيْهِ،
english translation text: which makes incumbent upon him Your good pleasure and bends toward him Your mercy,
give to us the like [of that] from Your wealth
and bestow it upon us in multiples through Your bounty,

arabic text: فَإنَّ فَضْلَكَ، لا يَغِيْضُ وَإنَّ خَـزَائِنَكَ لا تَنْقُصُ، بَـلْ تَفِيضُ
english translation text: for Your bounty does not diminish, Your treasuries do not decrease but overflow,
the mines of Your beneficence are not exhausted,
and Your bestowal is the bestowal full of delight!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَاكْتُبْ لَنَا مِثْلَ أجُورِ مَنْ صَامَهُ
english translation text: and write for us the like of the wages of him who fasted in it

arabic text: أَوْ تَعَبَّدَ لَكَ فِيْهِ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
english translation text: or worshipped You within it until the Day of Resurrection!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إنَّا نَتُوبُ إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ فِطْرِنَا
english translation text: O God, we repent to You in our day of fast-breaking,
which You hast appointed for the faithful a festival and a joy

arabic text: وَلأِهْلِ مِلَّتِكَ مَجْمَعاً وَمُحْتشداً مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْب أَذْنَبْنَاهُ،
english translation text: and for the people of Your creed a time of assembly and gathering, from every misdeed we did,

arabic text: أَوْ سُوْء أَسْلَفْنَاهُ، أَوْ خَاطِرِ شَرٍّ أَضْمَرْنَاهُ،
english translation text: ill work we sent ahead, or evil thought we secretly conceived,

arabic text: تَوْبَةَ مَنْ لاَ يَنْطَوِيْ عَلَى رُجُوع إلَى ذَنْب
english translation text: the repentance of one who does not harbour a return to sin
and who afterwards will not go back to offense,

arabic text: تَوْبَةً نَصوحاً خَلَصَتْ مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَالارْتِيَابِ،
english translation text: an unswerving repentance rid of doubt and wavering.

arabic text: فَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنَّا وَارْضَ عَنَّا وَثَبِّتنَا عَلَيْهَا.
english translation text: So accept it from us, be pleased with us, and fix us within it!
God, provide us with fear of the threatened punishment

arabic text: وَشَوْقَ ثَوَابِ الْمَوْعُودِ حَتّى نَجِدَ لَذَّةَ مَا نَدْعُوكَ بِهِ،
english translation text: and yearning for the promised reward, so that we may find the pleasure of that for which we supplicate You
and the sorrow of that from which we seek sanctuary in You!

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنَا عِنْدَكَ مِنَ التَّوَّابِيْنَ الَّذِينَ أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ مَحَبَّتَكَ،
english translation text: And place us with You among the repenters, those upon whom You hast made Your love obligatory

arabic text: وَقَبِلْتَ مِنْهُمْ مُرَاجَعَةَ طَاعَتِكَ، يَا أَعْدَلَ الْعَادِلِينَ.
english translation text: and from whom You hast accepted the return to obeying You! O Most Just of the just!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ تَجَاوَزْ عَنْ آبآئِنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا وَأَهْلِ دِيْنِنَا جَمِيعاً
english translation text: O God, show forbearance toward our fathers and our mothers and all the people of our religion,

arabic text: مَنْ سَلَفَ مِنْهُمْ وَمَنْ غَبَرَ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
english translation text: those who have gone and those who will pass by, until the Day of Resurrection!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد نَبِيِّنَا وَآلِهِ،
english translation text: O God, bless our prophet Muhammad and his Household,
as You hast blessed Your angels brought nigh,
bless him and his Household,
as You hast blessed Your prophets sent out,

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ،
english translation text: bless him and his Household, as You hast blessed Your righteous servants

arabic text: وَأَفْضَلَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ،
english translation text: - and better than that, O Lord of the worlds!
a blessing whose benediction will reach us, whose benefit will attain to us,
and through which our supplication may be granted!
You art the most generous of those who are beseeched,
the most sufficient of those in whom confidence is had,
the most bestowing of those from whom bounty is asked,
You art powerful over everything!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
